news.title: Spain closes airspace to US aircraft involved in Iran war
news.description: It follows a decision by the Spanish government to deny the US use of the two jointly run military bases in Andalusia.

news.title: Sexual violence part of 'everyday life' in parts of Sudan, charity says
news.description: Victims describe how they have been targeted while carrying out everyday activities.

news.title: Eurovision Song Contest launches first-ever Asia edition
news.description: Broadcasters from 10 countries, including South Korea and the Philippines, will be taking part.
